text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
118 
IP_FIL_DT 
LABEL: 
Inpatient File Date — Represents the Year and Month of the Reporting Period 
DESCRIPTION: This field represents the year and month of the reporting period. 
SHORT NAME: IP_FIL_DT 
LONG NAME: IP_FIL_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
VALUES: 
YYYYMM (e.g., 201507 is the date for the July 2015 file)
